query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "spatialclaw: rethinking action interface for agentic spatial reasoning" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism of "agentic reasoning" and "tool use" for LLMs, which is the central domain of the user's question regarding "Agentic Spatial Reasoning." Although the candidate paper focuses on general tool selection rather than the specific "SpatialClaw" interface, it provides the canonical prior work on the underlying agentic framework and dynamic tool integration that a literature review on extending spatial reasoning agents
